subject: [PATCH v2 1/2] x86/tdx: Fix off-by-one in port I/O handling

2026-04-28.patch_summary: This patch fixes an off-by-one error in port I/O handling for TDX (Trusted Domain Extensions) on x86 architecture. The issue was caused by a mask calculation that produced a one-bit too wide result, leading to incorrect behavior for certain I/O sizes. The fix adjusts the mask calculation to correctly handle all I/O sizes.
